name: Kolacky
recipeInstructions:
1. Use various flavors of fruit spread.
2. In a large bowl, combine butter and cream cheese; beat until smooth and creamy. Blend in vanilla.
3. Gradually add flour and salt to the butter mixture, mixing until a soft dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into two halves. Wrap each half in plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Roll out one half of the dough on a lightly floured pastry cloth or board to an 1/8-inch thickness.
7. Cut with the top of a glass or biscuit cutter into 3-inch rounds.
8. Spoon 1 tablespoon fruit spread onto the center of each dough circle.
9. Beat egg and water; lightly brush onto the edges of the dough circles.
10. Bring three edges of dough up over the fruit spread; pinch edges together to seal.
11. Place on ungreased cookie sheets; brush with egg mixture.
12. Repeat with remaining dough and fruit spread.
13. Bake for 12 minutes, until golden brown.
14. Let stand on cookie sheets for 1 minute before transferring to a wire rack.
15. Cool completely. Store in a tightly covered container.
